members.description: The set of row

members.name: cellAttribs

members.name: displayAttribs
members.description: The set of attributes actually displayed in the cell. They are a combination of the cell/row/col/table attributes described above. Accessed by row and column. When combining attributes, cell attributes take priority over row and column attributes, which themselves take priority over table attributes.

members.description: Last row with focus for editing.

members.description: The last column rolled over.

members.name: selectRow
members.description: The currently selected row.

members.name: selectionBorderColor
members.description: Get or set the border color for the separate selection, expressed as a 4-tuple (r,g,b,a), representing its red, green, blue and alpha value.

members.name: selectionColor
members.description: Get or set the background color for the separate selection, expressed as a 4-tuple (r,g,b,a), representing its red, green, blue and alpha value.

members.name: selections
members.description: Get or set the row and column coordinates for separate selection formatting, expressed as a list of 4-tuples, each containing: (startrow, startcol, endrow, endcol).

members.name: frame
members.description: Get or set time signature, second value.

members.name: seconds
members.description: Get or set the current time output by this component (expressed in seconds).

members.name: rate
members.description: Get or set the frames per second, (or rate).

members.name: play
members.description: Get or set whether the component is playing.

members.name: timecode
members.description: Get or set the current timecode generated by this component.

members.name: start
members.description: Get or set start of main frame range.

members.name: end
members.description: Get or set end of main frame range.

members.name: rangeStart
members.description: Get or set start of sub frame range. Must be within main start, end range

members.name: rangeEnd
members.description: Get or set end of sub frame range. Must be within main start, end range.

members.name: loop
members.description: Get or set whether the timeline loops.

members.name: independent
members.description: Get or set whether the timeline runs independently of other timelines.

members.name: tempo
members.description: Get or set beats per minute.

members.name: signature1
members.description: Get or set time signature, first value.

members.name: signature2
members.description: Get or set time signature, second value.

members.name: scalingMonitorIndex
members.description: Activates the window, sets it to the foregound and other visual cues. Sets focus and increases process priority.

members.name: isBorders
members.description: True if the window is bordered.

members.name: isFill
members.description: True if the window will stretch its contents to fill its specified area.

members.name: isOpen
members.description: True when window is open.

members.name: width
members.description: X position of left edge of the windows contents. Ignores borders if they are present. Expressed in points or pixels, depending on the 'DPI Scaling' parameter setting.

members.name: contentY
members.description: Y position of bottom edge of the windows contents. Ignores borders if they are present. Expressed in points or pixels, depending on the 'DPI Scaling' parameter setting.

members.name: contentWidth
members.description: Width of windows contents. Ignores borders if they are present. Expressed in points or pixels, depending on the 'DPI Scaling' parameter setting.

members.name: contentHeight
members.description: Height of windows contents. Ignores borders if they are present. Expressed in points or pixels, depending on the 'DPI Scaling' parameter setting.

methods.name: setForeground
methods.description: Activates the window, sets it to the foregound and other visual cues. Sets focus and increases process priority.
